sections.heading: Understanding ESD Protection in Electronic Systems and PCB Design Practices
sections.text: Blog > Understanding ESD Protection in Electronic Systems and PCB Design Practices Understanding ESD Protection in Electronic Systems and PCB Design Practices by: Mila Jun 24,2026 409 Views 0 Comments Posted in PCB Design & Layout ESD protection circuit SD protection circuit design Many hardware failures that appear random—such as USB communication errors, MCU resets, touch-screen malfunction, or unexplained field failures—can often be traced back to Electrostatic Discharge (ESD). Although an ESD event may last only a few nanoseconds, the resulting voltage can exceed several kilovolts and permanently damage semiconductor devices. Understanding ESD and Its Impact Electrostatic Discharge (ESD...

sections.heading: Understanding ESD and Its Impact
sections.text: Many hardware failures that appear random—such as USB communication errors, MCU resets, touch-screen malfunction, or unexplained field failures—can often be traced back to Electrostatic Discharge (ESD). Although an ESD event may last only a few nanoseconds, the resulting voltage can exceed several kilovolts and permanently damage semiconductor devices. Understanding ESD and Its Impact Electrostatic Discharge (ESD) is a short-duration high-voltage pulse generated when a charged object comes into contact with or approaches an electronic component. It is one of the leading causes of reliability issues in consumer electronics, industrial control systems, and communication equipment. Static char...
